summary: Tested Admin Analytics Dashboard feature - Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified. Analytics page displays summary cards, sales trend chart, top products, category breakdown, pet type breakdown, and recent customers correctly.

minor.issue: Minor inconsistency: stats endpoint counts all users, analytics excludes admins. Both behaviors are valid but may cause confusion.

passed_tests: Backend: /api/admin/analytics requires authentication (401)
Backend: /api/admin/analytics requires admin role (403 for regular user)
Backend: Analytics returns summary with total_revenue, total_orders, total_customers, avg_order_value
Backend: Analytics returns sales_trend array with 30 days of date/revenue/orders data
Backend: Analytics returns top_products with id, name, image, quantity, revenue
Backend: Analytics returns category_breakdown with category, revenue, orders
Backend: Analytics returns pet_type_breakdown with pet_type, revenue, orders
Backend: Analytics returns recent_customers with id, name, email, created_at
Backend: Analytics returns order_status_breakdown with status and count
Backend: Analytics returns acquisition_trend with 30 days of signup data
Backend: Analytics data accurately matches stats endpoint for orders count
Frontend: Admin Dashboard shows Analytics button with data-testid='analytics-btn'
Frontend: Analytics button navigates to /admin/analytics
Frontend: Analytics Dashboard page title 'Analytics Dashboard' displayed
Frontend: Revenue card shows $420 total revenue
Frontend: Orders card shows 5 total orders
Frontend: Customers card shows customer count
Frontend: AOV card shows $84 average order value
Frontend: Sales Trend chart section displayed with 'Last 30 days: $420'
Frontend: Top Products section shows 'Calming Dog Bed' with $300 revenue
Frontend: Sales by Category section shows 'Beds & Blankets' at 75%
Frontend: Sales by Pet Type section shows Dog category
Frontend: Recent Customers section shows customer list
Frontend: Time range selector 'Last 30 days' dropdown present
seed_data_creation: Test created a temporary user for admin role verification test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Analytics Dashboard fully functional. API endpoint /api/admin/analytics returns comprehensive data: summary (total_revenue, total_orders, total_customers, avg_order_value), sales_trend (30 days), top_products, category_breakdown, pet_type_breakdown, order_status_breakdown, recent_customers (10), acquisition_trend (30 days). Frontend AdminAnalyticsPage.jsx displays all data with charts and cards. Admin Dashboard has Analytics navigation button with data-testid='analytics-btn'. 5 orders with paid status exist showing ~$420 revenue.
